extracted_from: field_classification.md Category C (19 fields imperatively set as CIR rule activation side-effects)
purpose: Fields populated as side-effects of Conditional Integration Rule (CIR) activation. Each CIR has an actions[] array; when its trigger fires, the engine assigns the listed values to these fields. They are NOT Phase 1 nodes nor mandatory always-on configuration — they are conditional outputs of cross-method coordination logic.

fields.notes: Activates dynamic SSP/RCP background scenarios across LCA + LCC.
LCC counterpart of lca.background_futurisation; same SSP/RCP scenario family for cross-method coherence.
Pedigree Matrix scoring activated for LCA when ex-ante data is in use.
Pedigree Matrix scoring activated for LCC; matches LCA per CIR-02.
GIS-coupled spatial modeling for LCA transport / location-sensitive flows.
GIS-coupled cost computation for LCC; matches LCA per CIR-03.
S-LCA territorial dimension coupled to spatial GIS layer; relates to slca.territorial_dimension (set by slca_hc_10) but is a runtime coupling artifact, not a node config.

fields.trigger_summary: Q1=B AND network_nodes >= 3 AND interdependent_flows == true
fields.notes: Activates structural counterparty risk model (percolation theory) for multi-actor networks. Distinct from lcc.counterparty_risk node-default (lcc_mc_16) which is the user-facing choice.

DUAL-SOURCE FIELD (Mirko design call, field_gaps round 2): node default ('ReCiPe 2016 hierarchic + EF 3.1 backup') is set by lca_mc_25; CIR-05 overrides to 'EF_3.1' when Q4=D for PEF compliance. Read order at runtime: node default first, CIR override last.
Net Transfer Function allocation; CIR-05 side-effect distinct from the primary lcc.allocation_method node field (set by lcc_hc_10/lcc_mc_07).
CE Delft EU shadow prices for externality monetization in PEF-aligned reports. Default elsewhere is 'optional' (lcc_mc_19).
List of frontier impact categories (microplastic, soil, biodiversity) activated per Q6a sector overlay (lca_hc_19).
LCC externality categories matched to lca.frontier_categories. Cross-method coherence via CIR-06.

fields.trigger_summary: frontier_categories_active OR (Q1 in {B,C} AND IS-specific capital goods AND Q3.SOC active)
fields.notes: S-LCA indicators set adapted to: (1) sector frontier categories via CIR-06; (2) shared CAPEX stakeholder-group indicators via CIR-08.
Engineering scale-up framework for low-TRL inventory. lca_mc_20 sets the activation flag; CIR-07 enforces same framework family for LCC.

DUAL-SOURCE FIELD (Mirko design call, field_gaps round 2): node default is set by lcc_hc_15 when Q6b<=TRL7; CIR-07 enforces same framework family for cross-method coherence with lca.scale_up_framework. Read order at runtime: node default first, CIR override last.
LCA report must include real-world failure mode analysis per CIR-10 (D4.2 HC-30).
LCC report must include failure mode analysis per CIR-10.
S-LCA report must include failure mode analysis per CIR-10.

Event triggers that activate the iterative update protocol on the case object. Distinct from other CIR outputs in that it lives under case.* prefix (not pillar-specific) because the protocol is case-level, not method-level. NOTE: this entry was added post-classification — Mirko's original Category C table listed 19 fields and missed CIR-09's action LHS; corrected here to reach ZERO unknown.
